# RET — Retention / story progress

Genus: **Retentio**

Whether the body sustains attention through payoff and change.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H033 | *Retentio pulsus* var. h033-every-visual-reset | E. Visual rhythm and editing | Every visual reset must add information. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H034 | *Retentio pulsus* var. h034-screen-recording-zooms | E. Visual rhythm and editing | Screen-recording zooms improve retention for software tutorials. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H039 | *Retentio pulsus* var. h039-rapid-cuts-hurt | E. Visual rhythm and editing | Rapid cuts hurt when viewers need to read or inspect. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H040 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h040-payoff-inside-improves | F. Story and payoff | First payoff inside 3–7s improves retention. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H041 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h041-delayed-payoff-improves | F. Story and payoff | Delayed payoff improves completion only when tension is strong. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H042 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h042-problem-test-result | F. Story and payoff | Problem-test-result beats pure advice. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H043 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h043-before-after-strongest | F. Story and payoff | Before-after-why is strongest for visual edits. | SAV | M-SEQ |
| H047 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h047-story-beats-beats | F. Story and payoff | More story beats per second beats more cuts per second. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H139 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h139-information-bearing-cuts | Story beats | Information-bearing cuts outperform decorative cuts at the same cut frequency. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H140 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h140-visible-moment-change | Story beats | Videos with a visible moment of change outperform videos that only state advice. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H141 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h141-problem-test-result | Story beats | Problem-test-result beats here-are-tips for retention. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H152 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h152-ending-strongest-before | Peak-end / endings | Ending on the strongest before/after increases rewatch. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H153 | *Retentio retentiva* var. h153-final-rule-checklist | Peak-end / endings | A final rule or checklist improves remembered value. | SAV | M-SEQ |
| H177 | *Retentio pulsus* var. h177-person-reaction-cuts | Podcast / interview clip | Two-person reaction cuts increase perceived conversation energy compared with a static wide shot. | MIX | M-SEQ |
| H179 | *Retentio retentiva* var. h179-surprising-answers-should | Street interview / vox pop | Surprising answers should be previewed in the first second to increase completion. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H180 | *Retentio retentiva* var. h180-rapid-respondent-variety | Street interview / vox pop | Rapid respondent variety improves rewatch if the question is simple and repeated visually. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H182 | *Retentio retentiva* var. h182-rule-three-structure | Skit / comedy | Rule-of-three structure increases completion in short skits. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H189 | *Retentio commercialis* var. h189-close-tactile-shots | Product demo / unboxing | Close-up tactile shots increase watch time for physical products compared with presenter-only explanation. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H284 | *Retentio retentiva* var. h284-direct-callouts-improve | 3-second retention | Direct viewer callouts improve 3-second retention when the target audience is specific. | EHR | M-SEQ |
| H286 | *Retentio pulsus* var. h286-average-watch-rises | Average watch time | Average watch rises when each visual reset carries new information. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H287 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h287-retention-depends-micro | Average watch time | Mid-video retention depends on micro-payoffs every 5–8 seconds for tutorial content. | MIX | M-SEQ |
| H288 | *Retentio pulsus* var. h288-voiceover-pacing-should | Average watch time | Voiceover pacing should slow at inspection moments and speed through setup. | MIX | M-SEQ |
| H291 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h291-shorter-improve-completion | Completion | Shorter videos only improve completion if they preserve the first payoff and final resolution. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H293 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h293-looped-endings-increase | Rewatch | Looped endings increase rewatch but can reduce satisfaction if the loop hides the payoff. | RET | M-SEQ |
| H334 | *Retentio pulsus* var. h334-cuts-should-happen | Pacing | Cuts should happen when information changes, not when the editor gets bored. | MIX | M-SEQ |
| H337 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h337-problem-test-result | Story | Problem-test-result beats pure advice when the advice is not obvious. | MIX | M-SEQ |
| H338 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h338-before-after-strongest | Story | Before-after-why is the strongest structure when transformation is visible. | MIX | M-SEQ |
| H348 | *Retentio retentiva* var. h348-longer-short-form | Length | Longer short-form videos need visible progress markers to prevent perceived drift. | MIX | M-SEQ |
| H420 | *Retentio storyformis* var. h420-scripts-payoff-under | Pre-post scoring | Scripts with no first payoff under 7 seconds should be considered high-risk for cold audiences. | MIX | M-SEQ |
